revision.text:
{{日本の古墳|名称=鵜木大塚古墳|出土品=不明|ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳|アイコン=円墳-西|地図=Japan Tokyo|特記事項=|有形文化財=|史跡=東京都史跡|陵墓=|被葬者=|築造時期=古墳時代|陪塚=|埋葬施設=不明|別名=|規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m|形状=[[円墳]]|経度秒=39|経度分=40|経度度=139|緯度秒=28|緯度分=35|緯度度=35|所在地=[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]１４番１３号|所属=|ラベル位置=top}}鵜木大塚古墳（うのきおおつかこふん）は[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]に存在する[[古墳]]。[[古墳時代]]の円墳で[[荏原古墳群]]の一つ。同古墳群の中では最も東側にある一つで、一部は稲荷神社になっている。東京都史跡指定。 == 概要 == 鵜木大塚古墳は武蔵野台地南端部の荏原台地と呼ばれる地域に位置する荏原古墳群の一つで、直径27メートル、高さ６メートルの円墳である。旧鵜の木村の飛び地にあるため、鵜木大塚古墳と呼ばれている。比較的状態は良いが、南隅は切り崩されて稲荷社が造営されている。雪谷大塚町の町名の由来になったとも言われている。 == 外部リンク == 鵜木大塚古墳 - 大田区, https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html, 大田区, （参照 2021-12-23）. 東京都遺跡地図情報インターネット提供サービス, https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main, 東京都, （参照 2021-12-23）.

{{日本の古墳|名称=鵜木大塚古墳|出土品=不明|ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳|アイコン=円墳-西|地図=Japan Tokyo|特記事項=|有形文化財=|史跡=東京都史跡|陵墓=|被葬者=|築造時期=古墳時代|陪塚=|埋葬施設=不明|別名=|規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m|形状=[[円墳]]|経度秒=39|経度分=40|経度度=139|緯度秒=28|緯度分=35|緯度度=35|所在地=[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]１４番１３号|所属=|ラベル位置=top}}鵜木大塚古墳（うのきおおつかこふん）は[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]に存在する[[古墳]]。[[古墳時代]]の円墳で[[荏原台古墳群|荏原古墳群]]の一つ。同古墳群の中では最も東側にある一つで、一部は稲荷神社になっている。東京都史跡指定。 == 概要 == 鵜木大塚古墳は武蔵野台地南端部の荏原台地と呼ばれる地域に位置する荏原古墳群の一つで、直径27メートル、高さ６メートルの円墳である。旧鵜の木村の飛び地にあるため、鵜木大塚古墳と呼ばれている。比較的状態は良いが、南隅は切り崩されて稲荷社が造営されている。雪谷大塚町の町名の由来になったとも言われている。 == 外部リンク == 鵜木大塚古墳 - 大田区, https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html, 大田区, （参照 2021-12-23）. 東京都遺跡地図情報インターネット提供サービス, https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main, 東京都, （参照 2021-12-23）.

{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所属= |所在地=[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状=[[円墳]] |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |陪塚= |築造時期=[[古墳時代]] |被葬者= |陵墓= |史跡=東京都史跡 |有形文化財= |特記事項= |地図=Japan Tokyo |アイコン= |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''鵜木大塚古墳'''（うのきおおつかこふん）は、[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]に存在する[[古墳]]。[[古墳時代]]の円墳で[[荏原台古墳群|荏原古墳群]]の一つ。同古墳群の中では最も東側にある一つで、一部は稲荷神社になっている{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}}。東京都史跡指定。 == 概要 == 鵜木大塚古墳は武蔵野台地南端部の荏原台地と呼ばれる地域に位置する荏原古墳群の一つで、直径27メートル、高さ6メートルの円墳である。旧鵜の木村の飛び地にあるため、鵜木大塚古墳と呼ばれている。比較的状態は良いが、南隅は切り崩されて稲荷社が造営されている。雪谷大塚町の町名の由来になったとも言われている。 == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html 鵜木大塚古墳 - 大田区], 大田区, （参照 2021-12-23）. * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main 東京都遺跡地図情報インターネット提供サービス], 東京都, （参照 2021-12-23）. {{DEFAULTSORT:うのきおおつかこふん}} [[Category:東京都の古墳]]

revision.comment: Created page with "'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} in Japan. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{il..."

* * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}[[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}[[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hirui Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}[[ja:大垣市]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}[[ja:本巣市]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}[[ja:名古屋市守山区]], Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}[[ja:豊田市]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yada Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site.

{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). [[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}[[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}[[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}[[ja:大垣市]], Gifu Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). [[Category:kk]][[Category::dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category::Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:kk]][[Category::dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category::Round Kofun]] [[Category:kk]][[Category::dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category::Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category::dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category::Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}[[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}[[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}[[ja:大垣市]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}[[ja:本巣市]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}[[ja:名古屋市守山区]], Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}[[ja:豊田市]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}}[[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{disambiguation]] It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). 高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}[[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}[[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}[[ja:大垣市]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}[[ja:本巣市]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}[[ja:名古屋市守山区]], Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}[[ja:豊田市]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}}[[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{disambiguation]] 高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). 高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. 高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == 概要 == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23).
