高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}[[ja:本巣市]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}[[ja:名古屋市守山区]], Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}[[ja:豊田市]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}}[[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{disambiguation]] {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:東田大塚古墳]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:田主丸古墳群]]. revision.comment: Text replacement - "Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun" to "Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun"
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. revision.comment: Text replacement - "there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure" to "there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}[[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}[[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}[[ja:大垣市]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}[[ja:本巣市]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}[[ja:名古屋市守山区]], Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}[[ja:豊田市]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en}}[[ja:須恵器]] designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en}}[[ja:向日市]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}}[[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en}}[[ja:豊中市]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en}}[[ja:羽曳野市]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}}[[ja:宮内庁]] as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en}}[[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]]. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:東田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en}}[[ja:桜井市]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:今宿古墳群]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]], Fukuoka Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}[[ja:纒向古墳群]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:中山大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}[[ja:天理市]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en}}[[ja:磯城郡田原本町]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en}}[[ja:岡山市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en}}[[ja:倉敷市]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en}}[[ja:福岡市西区]], Fukuoka Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所在地={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). 高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been designated as a **Tokyo other_designation**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Information Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23).
