{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft}}14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |築造時期={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{draft categories| |12=draft}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[en:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]]

{{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=draft|12=draft}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en|12=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|12=draft|12=draft}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{draft categories| |12=draft}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[en:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=draft|12=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{draft categories| |qq=draft}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Tokyo]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Ōta (Tokyo)]] [[Category:Tokyo Historic Sites]] [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[en:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]]

revision.comment: 8 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:鵜木大塚古墳 up to rev 98353570
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |画像= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |別名= |所属= |所在地=[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]14番13号 |緯度度=35|緯度分=35|緯度秒=28 |経度度=139|経度分=40|経度秒=39 |形状=[[円墳]] |規模=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |埋葬施設=不明 |出土品=不明 |陪塚= |築造時期=[[古墳時代]] |被葬者= |陵墓= |史跡=東京都史跡 |有形文化財= |特記事項= |地図=Japan Tokyo |アイコン= |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''鵜木大塚古墳'''（うのきおおつかこふん）は、[[東京都]][[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]]に存在する[[古墳]]。[[古墳時代]]の円墳で[[荏原台古墳群|荏原古墳群]]の一つ。同古墳群の中では最も東側にある一つで、一部は稲荷神社になっている{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}}。東京都史跡指定。 == 概要 == 鵜木大塚古墳は武蔵野台地南端部の荏原台地と呼ばれる地域に位置する荏原古墳群の一つで、直径27メートル、高さ6メートルの円墳である。旧鵜の木村の飛び地にあるため、鵜木大塚古墳と呼ばれている。比較的状態は良いが、南隅は切り崩されて稲荷社が造営されている。雪谷大塚町の町名の由来になったとも言われている。 == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html 鵜木大塚古墳 - 大田区], 大田区, （参照 2021-12-23）. * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main 東京都遺跡地図情報インターネット提供サービス], 東京都, （参照 2021-12-23）. {{DEFAULTSORT:うのきおおつかこふん}} [[Category:東京都の古墳]]

It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. 高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en}}, Gifu Prefecture. revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}} {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta (Tokyo)|qq=}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|qq=}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta (Tokyo)|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|qq=}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. 高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built=[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|qq=}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] located in [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|qq=}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location=[[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]] [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]] {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built=[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|qq=}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] located in [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|qq=}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Agency|qq=}} as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai, Nara|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| |qq=draft}} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[en:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]]

Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| |qq=draft}} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[en:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}}

{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location=[[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]] [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]] {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built=[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|qq=}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] located in [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|qq=}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Agency|qq=}} as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai, Nara|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{disambiguation]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{citation needed|Otsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| |qq=draft}} [[sn:Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] [[sn:noki Ōtsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}}

It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123120902]] Wikidata name: Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location=[[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]] [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]] {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built=[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] located in [[:en:Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta (Tokyo)]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|qq=}}. It is a **circular kofun** from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|qq=}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an **Inari Shrine**.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a **Tokyo Historic Site**. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the **Ebaradai Plateau**, a southern extension of the **Musashino Plateau**. It has a **diameter of 27 meters** and a **height of 6 meters**. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an **enclave of Unoki Village**. Despite its age, the kofun is in **relatively good condition**, although the **southern corner has been cut away** to make space for an **Inari Shrine**. It is also believed to be the **origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi"**. == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}.
