This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. 高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| |qq=draft}} [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q123120902}} [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]]

[[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == ギャラリー == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q123120902}} [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]]

revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Agency|qq=}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai, Nara|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q123120902}} [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]]

Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747|1=Round Kofun}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Agency|qq=}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai, Nara|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q123120902}} [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]] [[Category:pages]]

It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTcommons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747|1=Round Kofun}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTcommons:Category:Unokiootsuka Kofun]][[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747|1=Round Kofun}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially Historic Site1 by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Agency|qq=}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai, Nara|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurashiki|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|version=98353570|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鵜木大塚古墳]] [[ja:大田区雪谷大塚町]] [[ja:宮崎大塚古墳]] [[ja:川崎市宮前区宮崎]] [[ja:昼飯大塚古墳]] [[ja:大垣市]] [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] [[ja:本巣市]] [[ja:志段味大塚古墳]] [[ja:名古屋市守山区]] [[ja:豊田大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊田市]] [[ja:須恵器]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[ja:向日市]] [[ja:桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳]] [[ja:豊中市]] [[ja:軽里大塚古墳]] [[ja:羽曳野市]] [[ja:宮内庁]] [[ja:日本武尊白鳥陵]] [[ja:東田大塚古墳]] [[ja:桜井市]] [[ja:纒向古墳群]] [[ja:中山大塚古墳]] [[ja:天理市]] [[ja:柳本大塚古墳]] [[ja:黒田大塚古墳]] [[ja:磯城郡田原本町]] [[ja:牟佐大塚古墳]] [[ja:岡山市]] [[ja:箭田大塚古墳]] [[ja:倉敷市]] [[ja:今宿大塚古墳]] [[ja:福岡市西区]] [[ja:今宿古墳群]] [[ja:田主丸大塚古墳]] [[ja:浮羽郡田主丸町]] [[ja:田主丸古墳群]] [[ja:大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Unokiootsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q123120902}} [[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

{{Infobox ancient site|image=File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg|location={{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|WD=Q11659945|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō}}|architectural_styles={{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747|1=Round Kofun}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|WD=Q11618305|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun}} |名称=鵜木大塚古墳 |image= [[File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg|300px]] |alternate_name= |location={{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}} {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}14番13号 |coordinates=35|coordinates=35|coordinates=28 |coordinates=139|coordinates=40|coordinates=39 |type={{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |area=墳丘長27m
高さ6m |Burial Facility=不明 |burial goods=不明 |built={{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} |史跡={{ill|Tokyo Historic Site|ja|東京都史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |地図=Japan Tokyo |ラベル=鵜木大塚古墳 |ラベル位置=top }} '''Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun''' (鵜木大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|Ōta, Tokyo|WD=Q217234|lt=Ōta (Tokyo)|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, specifically in {{ill|Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|ja|雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi|1=Yukigaya-Ōtsukachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659945}}. It is a circular kofun from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and one of the tombs within the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun group|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun group|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}. It is the easternmost kofun of this group, and part of it has been converted into an Inari Shrine.{{Cite web|和書|title=鵜木大塚古墳|url=https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html|website=www.city.ota.tokyo.jp|accessdate=2021-12-26|language=ja}} It has been Historic Site1 as a Tokyo Historic Site. == Overview == Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun is one of the tombs located on the Ebaradai Plateau, a southern extension of the Musashino Plateau. It has a diameter of 27 meters and a height of 6 meters. The name "Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun" derives from the fact that it was historically part of an enclave of Unoki Village. Despite its age, the kofun is in relatively good condition, although the southern corner has been cut away to make space for an Inari Shrine. It is also believed to be the origin of the name "Yukigaya-Ōtsukamachi". == Gallery == File:鵜木大塚古墳2 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳3 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳4 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳1 20230128.jpg File:鵜木大塚古墳5 20230128.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/shisetsu/rekishi/minemachi_denenchoufu/unokiootsuka_kofun.html Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun - Ōta City Official Website] (accessed 2021-12-23). * [https://tokyo-iseki.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/map.html#main Tokyo Archaeological Site Intypeation Internet Service], Tokyo Metropolitan Government (accessed 2021-12-23). ** Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruiōzuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgaki|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu|qq=}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota|qq=}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sue ware|qq=}} Historic Site1 as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukō|qq=}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makimuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenri|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture.
